ValidationRule.description: Blocks setting a Delay Invoice Date outside the 15-day window before the Subscription Start Date. Allowed range: Start Date minus 15 days through Start Date (inclusive).
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT(ISBLANK(Delay_Invoice_Date__c)), NOT(ISBLANK(SBQQ__StartDate__c)), OR( Delay_Invoice_Date__c < SBQQ__StartDate__c - 15, Delay_Invoice_Date__c > SBQQ__StartDate__c ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Delay Invoice Date must fall within 15 days before the Subscription Start Date and cannot be after it. Please enter a date between 15 days before and the Start Date.
